allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=dev123 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U dev -d community_manager -c "SELECT name, default_version FROM pg_available_extensions WHERE name LIKE ''%postgis%'';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=dev123 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U dev -d community_manager -c "\d chat_rooms")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=dev123 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U dev -d community_manager -c "\d room_participants")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=dev123 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U dev -d community_manager -c "SELECT column_name, data_type, udt_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = ''room_participants'' AND column_name = ''role'';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=dev123 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U dev -d community_manager -c "SELECT enumlabel FROM pg_enum WHERE enumtypid = ''participant_role''::regtype ORDER BY enumsortorder;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=dev123 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U dev -d community_manager -c "INSERT INTO room_participants (room_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (''00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000''::uuid, ''11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111''::uuid, ''member'', NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;")
